name: upgrade_planner
description:
Ranked upgrade recommendations for project dependencies. Combines vulnerability severity, deprecation status, and version distance to produce a prioritized upgrade plan.

Shows quick wins (safe patch/minor upgrades) separately from breaking changes (major version bumps). Use this after dependency_health to plan your upgrade strategy.

Privacy: uses cached registry data. No additional network calls beyond what dependency_health already fetched.

risk_threshold.description: Only show upgrades at or above this risk level. Default: all.
